title: Proposed best available techniques (BAT) implementation guidance for mid-merit gas generators
body: "We propose to:   introduce a new category of flexible gas generators called mid-merit allow mid-merit to have longer hours providing they meet a set of criteria incentivise the deployment of low oxides of nitrogen (NOx) flexible gas generation   This consultation is your opportunity to share insights, raise concerns or highlight unintended consequences that we may not have considered. "
